DocxInWeb pixel parity

sha ab85a90 · 2026-07-14T21:28:26.579Z · 1154 pages · base http://localhost:5299 · partial run — refreshed probe3-thai · outcome accepted · appearance semantic-rgba-v1

DocxInWeb's in-browser render of every fixture, compared pixel-by-pixel against desktop Microsoft Word's PDF of the same file. Scores are the % of ink that doesn't match (antialiasing noise excluded); lower is better, 0.00 is pixel-parity.

Mean structural
0.03%
▼ 0.22 pp
Worst page (Word-authored)
probe3-thai p1 — 3.95%
▼ 96.05 pp

▲ 1

Mean page-weight error (<3%)
1.21%
no change
Mean source-colour ΔE00 (<3)
0.17
no change

Scores by category

Every page is classified into a capability area. Each card shows the mean structural score, worst page (linked to its diff image), and how many pages exceed 1%. Cards are ordered worst-first. Expand a category below to see every page.

Formatting & layout
69 pages · 32 fixtures
0.00%mean structural
no change
0 pages ≥ 1%56/69 clean
worst staging-typography p1 — 0.10%

Page and character layout — columns, sections and breaks, tabs, drop caps, borders, styles, frames, orientation, mirror margins and typography.

Pages by category

Severity = structural residual: unmatched binary ink after global page registration, or ink that only matches after an 8–24px vertical shift (5% noise floor removed). Alignment-, weight- and colour-only differences are excluded and named by the chip instead. Hover a bar for the full metric breakdown; click it to open the page's diff image.

semantic-rgba-v1

Corpus means are weighted by semantic category mass. 2 / 1154 pages have valid semantic measurements; 1152 invalid semantic pages prevent a pass. All error gates require <3; text-colour coverage requires ≥95%.

Trend across runs

meanworst pagelegacy metric

Metric changes are shown as disconnected segments. Legacy runs remain visible, but only ink-dilate-line-v5 runs are used for current deltas.

Persisted run history

Semantic appearance is comparable only for semantic-rgba-v1 runs; earlier appearance data is shown as unavailable. Structural history remains independently comparable by ink-dilate-line-v5.

sha ab85a90 · 2026-07-14T21:28:26.579Z · 1 pages · base http://localhost:5299 · partial run — refreshed probe3-thai · outcome accepted · appearance semantic-rgba-v1

DocxInWeb's in-browser render of every fixture, compared pixel-by-pixel against desktop Microsoft Word's PDF of the same file. Scores are the % of ink that doesn't match (antialiasing noise excluded); lower is better, 0.00 is pixel-parity.

Scores by category

Every page is classified into a capability area. Each card shows the mean structural score, worst page (linked to its diff image), and how many pages exceed 1%. Cards are ordered worst-first. Expand a category below to see every page.

Pages by category

Severity = structural residual: unmatched binary ink after global page registration, or ink that only matches after an 8–24px vertical shift (5% noise floor removed). Alignment-, weight- and colour-only differences are excluded and named by the chip instead. Hover a bar for the full metric breakdown; click it to open the page's diff image.
